name: Michal Nowak
education: Master of Science (MSc), Computer Science from AGH University of Krakow
headline: Senior Software Engineer at Microsoft
about: MSFT veteran. Low-level systems, kernel, and drivers' development for Windows and Unix/Linux. Assembler, C, C++, Rust, C#, .NET. Proven track record in delivering user-facing UI features using Win32, WinForms, and WPF. MSFT patents and awards, bringing over 15 years of experience in high-impact software engineering. Currently contributing to Microsoft Trust and Security Services by malware hunting across Microsoft's software supply chains. ATARI 130 XE demo scene.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Transforming dreams into reality at Microsoft Silicon Valley Campus (SVC).
•	Devices, engineering and experiences. Mixed reality, MX, MR, AR. HoloLens. IVAS.

experiences.title: Staff Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Spearheaded the expansion of market reach to Microsoft tech stack clients as Lead Developer for the Windows agent, utilizing Python, C, C++, and PowerShell.
•	Enhanced customer satisfaction and support efficiency by directly resolving customer incidents.
•	Reduced the number of client incidents by implementing comprehensive unit tests, enhancing software reliability and quality.
•	Reduced the number of client incidents and ensured long-term code quality benefits by introducing and maintaining an improved PR culture, including the implementation of PR guardrails and active participation in PR reviews, thereby preventing issues early and enhancing product stability.
•	Reduced the number of client incidents, ensured long-term code quality, and enhanced product stability by introducing and maintaining an improved PR culture, including the implementation of PR guardrails and active participation in PR reviews, thereby preventing issues early.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
• Contributed to the development of a robust Windows Defender digital fortress, significantly improving the cyber-wellbeing of Windows users.
• Ensured cutting-edge protection against emerging threats by leading the comprehensive end-to-end design, development, and deployment of virtual environments for testing and executing new threat detection systems.
•  Improved efficiency by developing and deploying PowerShell scripts to create virtual environments and manage Azure pipelines, streamlining the deployment and execution of virtual environments.
•  Bolstered system defenses by developing kernel mode drivers to simulate and trigger potential threats, leveraging expertise in low-level systems programming and C, C++, and kernel development.

experiences.title: Staff Software Developer Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Lead Architect of public .NET C# REST APIs, a critical factor in successfully acquiring FAANG companies as the company’s customers.
•	Facilitated the company's ability to handle rapid growth and increasing traffic by scaling and breaking down large projects into .NET Core microservices and moving them to GCP.
•	Improved organization efficiency and time to market by implementing or improving on multiple internal .NET frameworks and processes.
•	Supported growth of client base and connectivity with 3rd parties by implementing C# microservices, single sign-on SAML, and OAuth2.
•	Drastically reduced code review times and bugs found in the production environment by designing, implementing, and onboarded the entire engineering department to an automated mechanism rejecting pull requests with security vulnerabilities and common mistakes that peers can miss or which are trivial. This. Tools used: Semmle QL, Code QL, GitHub security.
•	Significantly contributed to the acquisition of Amazon as a client by redesigning and improving the crucial C# engine operating on millions of database records.
•	Spearheaded R&D resulting in new features and technologies allowing more prominent marker exposure for the company.
•	Implemented MT940 bank format parser to allow the company to operate with international SWIFT financial institutions.
•	Resident domain expert on C# code quality and performance.

experiences.title: Software Developer Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
• Contributed to the successful launch of the first-generation Microsoft Surface tablet by porting parts of .NET from x86/AMD64 to ARM, achieving Microsoft’s performance goals, and receiving the internal gold star “excellence in engineering” award.
• Supported Windows' entry into the small factor devices market by contributing to the C/C++ graphics framework for the redesigned “metro” UI.
• Co-inventor of US patents US8949857 and US20120284662, used for improved performance and UI responsiveness in every Windows SKU since Windows 8.
• Increased the reliability of the Windows operating system by adding features and fixing numerous issues across the kernel stack, demonstrating expertise in C, C++, assembler, and the general workings of operating systems.
• Delivered File History, a flagship Windows feature, competing with Apple's "time machine."
Proved .NET as a viable tool for mission-critical native components by achieving rigorous cold startup times for the first Windows .NET native feature, File History, written in C# and C++/CLI.
• Contributed to the delivery of Microsoft Cortana by collaborating with the Bing team on early prototypes, telemetry, and network interfacing.
Assisted in the early implementation and return of the Windows Start Button and Start Menu for Windows 8.1+.
• Improved Windows shell UX design by working with designers to switch from image-based redlines to XAML-based documents.
• Enhanced the Windows Home Server end-user experience by redesigning the Launchpad feature using C# and WPF.
• Worked with .NET Framework WPF and DUI developers on performance and memory management improvements.
• Designed and implemented solutions for Products and Services Supply Chain Security, Anti-Malware, and Vulnerability scanning using C#, PowerShell, C/C++, and Azure, enhancing Microsoft’s threat detection capabilities.
• Reduced time and cost of code maintenance and onboarding through a strong commitment to code quality and correctness.

experiences.companyName: AGH University of Science and Technology
experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.jobDescription: Led the creation of a game-changing .NET C# telemedicine app, bringing cardiac care to the digital age. Meshed cutting-edge imaging tech like MRI with DirectX and OpenGL for groundbreaking remote diagnoses. Crafted a swift, secure socket-based protocol for online medical consults. Navigated DICOM standards to make our app a go-to for hospitals and government. Collaborated with med pros to design a doctor-friendly interface in WPF and WinForms. Our app? A star in medical journals and a winner at medical conferences!

recommendations.name: mamta sharma
recommendations.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer | Lead | Microsoft | Azure Cloud | Cyber Security | Distributed Systems | Building scalable, secure, enterprise solutions
recommendations.context: Michal worked with mamta on the same team
recommendations.description:
I’ve had the pleasure of working closely with Mamta in Microsoft’s antimalware Scan team and I can confidently say she is one of the most reliable and technically strong engineers I’ve collaborated with. Her expertise in cloud development, microservices, and secure distributed systems—handling millions of requests every day—truly stands out. She has contributed to one of Microsoft’s most critical security platforms, large-scale services relied on by hundreds of teams across Microsoft.
 Her ability to design and maintain such high-throughput, security-sensitive systems shows exceptional technical depth and ownership. She works independently, cross-collaboratively without ever compromising on quality, communicates proactively, and her self-driven attitude delivers clean, scalable, thoughtfully designed solutions. Her problem-solving approach is both practical and innovative, making her the go-to person for complex architectural or debugging challenges.
 Beyond her technical skills, Mamta is a great mentor, supportive, humble, and collaborative teammate. Any team would be fortunate to have her.

recommendations.name: Tilottama Banerjee, PMQ (SHRM)
recommendations.subtitle: Senior Manager, People Operations
recommendations.context: Michal worked with Tilottama but on different teams
recommendations.description: I had the pleasure of working with Tilottama Banerjee at Stellar Cyber during my onboarding and throughout my time there. Her exceptional expertise in HR and Immigration made my transition seamless, and her proactive approach ensured all HR and immigration matters were handled efficiently. Tilottama was always available to address any questions or concerns, providing clear and concise explanations. Her dedication and support were invaluable, making her an asset to any organization.

recommendations.name: Pio V.
recommendations.subtitle: Co-Founder at The Nifty
recommendations.description: Pio introduced me to a very good company, he guided and coached me through the entire process and got me an excellent offer. All that time he remained professional, very responsive and polite. I highly recommend working with Pio.

recommendations.name: Aakash Shah
recommendations.subtitle: Senior Talent Acquisition Manager (Hands‑On) | Technical Recruiting & Sourcing | AI‑Enhanced Hiring | ex‑Microsoft
recommendations.context: Michal worked with Aakash but they were at different companies
recommendations.description: Aakash is professional and smart recruiter. His style of working is very successful, I strongly recommend working with him.
